    Opens a dialog to create a follow up question.

    StudentQAPage.openLogDialog(Question q)
    Opens a dialog showing an activity log.

    Creates a composer for private messages

    StudentQAPage.questionRow(Question q)
    Gets an HBox with the answer count and private messages for a question along with their details.

    StudentQAPage.renderFollowups(Question q)
    Method to render follow up questions.
    private void
    StudentQAPage.renderPrivateSection(Question q)

    Renders public answers for a question with feedback functionality.

    Method
    Description
    Question
    DatabaseHelper.getQuestionByAnswerId(int answerId)
    Retrieves the ID of the question associated with a specific answer ID.
    Question

    Gets a question by its ID.
    Methods in databasePart1 that return types with arguments of type Question
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Question>
    DatabaseHelper.getAllQuestions(String username)
    Gets all questions by a specific user.
    List<Question>
    DatabaseHelper.getFollowupQuestions(int parentQuestionId)
    Gets a list of questions that have a parent question (follow up questions).
    List<Question>
    DatabaseHelper.getQuestionsTopLevel()
    Gets a list of questions where parentQuestionId is NULL (Top Level).
    List<Question>
    DatabaseHelper.getUnresolvedQuestions()
    Gets a list of all unresolved questions in the database.
    List<Question>
    DatabaseHelper.searchQuestions(String keyword)
    Gets a list of questions based on a keyword.

    Method
    Description
